subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The time is known, and in this grievous calamity which hath encompassed all, the hour hath come to stand firm in the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان وقت میدانست و هنگام ثبوت بر پیمان در این مصیبت کبری که احاطه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
